name: Cake Nalesniki with Cream Filling
recipeInstructions:
------------
1. In a bowl, combine eggs, sour cream, 3 tablespoons of granulated sugar, 1 tablespoon of all-purpose flour, vanilla, and lemon peel.
2. Place the mixture over boiling water (the upper pan should not touch the water).
3. Cook, stirring constantly, until thickened. Remove from the heat.
4. Cover the surface of the pudding with waxed paper and let it cool to room temperature.
5. In a separate bowl, beat egg yolks with 1 tablespoon of granulated sugar until thick and lemon-colored.
6. Add flour and milk alternately, beating well after each addition.
7. Fold in the stiffly beaten egg whites.
8. Heat a griddle or non-stick pan. Drop by spoonfuls onto the hot, greased surface.
9. Cook each pancake for 1 minute on each side.
10. Place cooked pancakes on paper towels to cool.
11. Spoon about 1 teaspoon of filling onto each pancake and roll up.
12. Transfer the rolled-up pancakes into a 10x6x2-inch baking dish.
13. Cover with powdered sugar.
14. Bake at 350°F for about 15 minutes, or until warmed through.
